# StreamPlanetTV

> StreamPlanetTV is a premium IPTV subscription service offering access to over 20,000 live TV channels and video-on-demand content in 4K UHD quality, with a stable and reliable streaming infrastructure. A free 24-hour trial is available via WhatsApp.

## About

StreamPlanetTV provides IPTV subscriptions for customers in the Netherlands, France, Belgium, and other European countries. The service focuses on stability, high-definition quality, and 24/7 technical support.

- Website: https://streamplanettv.online/
- Contact: via WhatsApp on the contact page
- Languages: Dutch (NL), French (FR), English (EN)
- Free trial: 24 hours, no credit card required

## Services

- Live TV: 20,000+ channels including sports, movies, series, and news
- Video on Demand (VOD): thousands of movies and series
- Supported devices: Smart TV, Android TV, Amazon FireStick, iOS, PC/Mac, MAG Box, Formuler/Enigma
- Streaming quality: 4K UHD, Full HD, HD
- Subscription plans: 3 months, 6 months, 12 months
